evals.description: Skill triggers when asked to write API documentation
evals.prompt: Document the POST /api/v1/orders endpoint for our REST API

evals.description: Skill triggers when asked to write a tutorial
evals.prompt: Write a getting-started tutorial for our Node.js SDK

evals.description: Skill triggers when asked to write an ADR
evals.prompt: Write an ADR for choosing Redis as our caching layer

evals.description: Agent produces correct API doc structure with all required fields
evals.prompt: Document a DELETE /api/v1/users/:id endpoint that requires admin authentication and returns 204 on success

evals.description: Agent writes a tutorial with prerequisites and numbered steps
evals.prompt: Write a tutorial for setting up a PostgreSQL database with Docker for local development

evals.description: Agent writes an ADR using the Nygard format with consequences
evals.prompt: Write an ADR for migrating from REST to GraphQL for our public API

evals.description: Agent writes a runbook with exact commands and expected output
evals.prompt: Write a runbook for restarting a Kubernetes deployment when pods are in CrashLoopBackOff

evals.description: Agent writes architecture documentation with C4 model layers
evals.prompt: Write architecture documentation for an e-commerce platform with a React frontend, Node.js API, and PostgreSQL database

evals.description: Agent handles the gotcha of ADR immutability correctly
evals.prompt: We decided to use MongoDB in ADR-003 but now want to switch to PostgreSQL. How do I update the ADR?

evals.description: Agent handles the gotcha of runbooks needing exact commands
evals.prompt: Review this runbook step: 'Step 2: Restart the service and check if it recovers'

evals.description: Agent does not hallucinate a specific documentation standard that does not exist
evals.prompt: Write API docs following the IETF RFC 9457 documentation standard for endpoint structure

assertions.value: IETF RFC 9457 documentation standard for endpoint structure

evals.description: Agent does not invent a fictional documentation tool
evals.prompt: Should I use DocuForge Pro to generate my API documentation?

evals.description: Agent correctly references the ADR reference file for detailed templates
evals.prompt: What ADR format options are available and when should I use each?
